info.title: mongo-utils
info.description: A DotNet Tool to help manage some common MongoDB tasks during development such as running migrations and saving and loading test scenario data

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Drop database and run all migrations

commands.name: health
commands.description: Runs a Health Check against a MongoDB instance

commands.name: save
commands.description: Export current DB state as a scenario to disk
